name: Marco Aiello | Daredevil racer
description:
|Cosa Nostra series|

"Overconfident or just too caught up in the interest? Either way, this is just a game to Marco. A new prize he must get his hands on at all costs. But there's a chance things might not go according to his perfectly laid out plan, isn't there?"

Tropes: race, from enemies to lovers, mafia (indirectly).

There he is! This is the end of Cosa Nostra. Perhaps I'll write some alt scripts in the future. Let me know if you're interested!

I really fell in love with Marco while I was creating him. I hope you love this boy as much as I do!
creator: Darry
